Ottawa

Ottawa Gigs

The best place to discover live music in Ottawa

Ottawa Public Skating

0-0-2day (Pickleball)

Find a game of pickleball in Ottawa, today

Ottawa recreation schedule data

An unofficial dataset of the City of Ottawa drop-in recreation schedules, updated daily.

Waterloo

Connected KW

A volunteer-run project that curates events and resources for anyone living in Waterloo Region.
